mapper.select: SELECT id, chain_name, chain_desc, el_data, route, namespace, `enable`, sort, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by, remark, version FROM liteflow_chain WHERE deleted = 0 AND create_time >= #{timeFrom} AND create_time <= #{timeTo} AND id = #{id} AND chain_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{chainName}, '%') AND chain_desc = #{chainDesc} AND namespace = #{namespace} AND enable = #{enable} ORDER BY sort ASC, id ASC
